response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (The video contains no spoken dialogue or vocals, only instrumental music). 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON correctly identified the absence of vocal music. Manual translation and transcription were applied to capture the prominent visual text announcements. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were generated exclusively for key on-screen transition cards (the concert start announcement and visitor safety rules) during their clear on-screen visibility.

subtitles.original: The concert will be starting soon.
subtitles.english: The concert will be starting soon.
